tasks.title: Create lib/Service/Integration/IntegrationProvider.php interface (15 methods)
tasks.description: Includes getStorageStrategy() allowing 'magic-column' | 'link-table' | 'external' | 'query-time' and getOpenConnectorSource(): ?string per design.md normative contract.

tasks.title: Create lib/Service/Integration/AbstractIntegrationProvider.php base class with sensible defaults
tasks.description: group=null, requiresPermission=null, authRequirements=['type'=>'none'], getOpenConnectorSource() returns null, get() throws NotImplemented for list-only providers.

tasks.title: Create lib/Service/Integration/IntegrationRegistry.php — explicit addProvider() registration
tasks.description: Spec said 'DI-tag-based discovery' but modern NC does not expose IAppContainer::queryAll(<tag>) as a public API. Switched to explicit addProvider() at app bootstrap — same semantics. Includes collision detection (AD-13) and external-source rejection (AD-4). list(), listIds(), get(), getEnabled(); withProviders() test seam.

tasks.title: Create lib/Service/Integration/ExternalIntegrationRouter.php — routes storage:external through OpenConnector
tasks.description: Surfaces auth status; raises ProviderUnavailableException with details.cause of 'openconnector-down' | 'openconnector-source-missing' | 'upstream-service-down' per AD-23. Includes probe() for admin/OCS health reporting.

tasks.title: Update lib/AppInfo/Application.php to register IntegrationRegistry + ExternalIntegrationRouter
tasks.description: New private registerIntegrationRegistry() phase wires both as shared per-request singletons. Built-in providers' DI registration moves to tasks 12-17 — each *Provider self-registers via addProvider() at bootstrap.

tasks.title: Define query-time storage-strategy contract in code
tasks.description: Documented in IntegrationProvider interface docblocks; AbstractIntegrationProvider defaults mutation methods (get/create/update/delete) to NotImplementedException; new QueryTimeContract helper carries the 2s render timeout + HTTP 501 envelope builder for ObjectsController to consume in tasks 7-11.

tasks.title: Modify lib/Db/Schema.php::validateLinkedTypesValue()
tasks.description: Now consults BOTH the deprecated VALID_LINKED_TYPES fallback AND IntegrationRegistry::listIds(). Registry resolved lazily via \OC::$server->get() since Schema is an Entity (not a service); falls back to fallback-only when container isn't booted (unit tests). AD-5 backwards-compat preserved.

tasks.title: Mark Schema::VALID_LINKED_TYPES constant @deprecated with pointer to the registry
tasks.description: Deprecation notice referencing IntegrationRegistry::listIds() + the cleanup-linked-entity-type-map follow-up.

tasks.title: Mark LinkedEntityService::TYPE_COLUMN_MAP constant @deprecated
tasks.description: Removal scheduled in follow-up cleanup change.

tasks.title: Add referenceType validation to schema property type system
tasks.description: New PropertyReferenceTypeValidator service consults IntegrationRegistry::isValidIntegrationId(). Kept as a standalone validator so existing schema validation paths stay untouched; opt-in callers wire it where they need the marker enforced (CnFormDialog / CnDetailGrid landings in tasks 25-46).

tasks.title: Add migration that logs schemas with linkedTypes referencing unregistered ids
tasks.description: Repair step LogDanglingLinkedTypes registered under <install> + <post-migration> in info.xml. Strictly informational; never throws, never modifies data.

tasks.title: lib/Service/Integration/BuiltinProviders/FilesProvider.php
tasks.description: Wraps FileService (magic-column). list() delegates to FileService::getFilesForEntity() after resolving the ObjectEntity via the container; mutation throws NotImplementedException until the controller refactor consolidates writes (tasks 18-22).

tasks.title: lib/Service/Integration/BuiltinProviders/NotesProvider.php
tasks.description: Wraps NoteService (link-table). Full CRUD delegation.

tasks.title: lib/Service/Integration/BuiltinProviders/TasksProvider.php
tasks.description: Wraps TaskService (link-table, CalDAV). Composite {calendarId}/{taskUri} entity ids; full CRUD delegation.

tasks.title: lib/Service/Integration/BuiltinProviders/TagsProvider.php
tasks.description: Wraps NC system tag manager (link-table). list() via ISystemTagObjectMapper::getTagIdsForObjects; mutation throws — TagsController owns the write path for now.

tasks.title: lib/Service/Integration/BuiltinProviders/AuditTrailProvider.php
tasks.description: Wraps AuditTrailMapper (query-time, AD-22). Read-only by design; mutation inherits NotImplementedException from AbstractIntegrationProvider.

tasks.title: All five providers register through addProvider() at Application::boot()
tasks.description: New bootBuiltinIntegrationProviders() helper. Frontend-side referenceType: <id> declarations land in tasks 25-30 when each provider gets its JS registry counterpart.

tasks.title: Create lib/Controller/IntegrationsController.php
tasks.description: GET /api/integrations (with group+enabled filters), GET /api/integrations/{id}. Role-redacted descriptor (AD-17).

tasks.title: Sub-resource dispatch via the registry
tasks.description: New dedicated ObjectIntegrationsController owns /api/objects/{...}/integrations/{integrationId}[/{entityId}] (GET / POST / PUT / DELETE). Additive — ObjectsController stays untouched. Error translation: NotImplementedException -> 501 with QueryTimeContract envelope; ProviderUnavailableException -> 503 with details.cause (AD-23); unknown id -> 404.

tasks.title: Add /api/integrations + sub-resource routes to appinfo/routes.php
tasks.description: Mounts both IntegrationsController and ObjectIntegrationsController endpoints.

tasks.title: Add lib/Capabilities/IntegrationsCapability.php
tasks.description: Surfaces the registry through /ocs/v2.php/cloud/capabilities, role-redacted per AD-17. Spec said 'Update lib/Service/CapabilitiesService.php'; OR's capability pattern uses one ICapability class per concern (see UrnCapability) — new file in lib/Capabilities/ + $context->registerCapability(). Same end shape, idiomatic structure.

tasks.title: Register IntegrationsCapability via $context->registerCapability()
tasks.description: info.xml doesn't carry capability declarations in OR — registration happens at runtime via IRegistrationContext::registerCapability(), mirroring the existing UrnCapability pattern. No appinfo/info.xml change needed.

tasks.title: Create lib/Settings/IntegrationsAdminSection.php
tasks.description: Admin section listing integrations + auth status + Configure buttons.

tasks.title: Wire admin section to OpenConnector credential management for storage:external providers
tasks.description: Configure buttons deep-link into OpenConnector.

tasks.title: Per-integration Test connection action in admin UI
tasks.description: Calls provider's auth-test method, displays result.

tasks.title: Create src/integrations/registry.js — window.OCA.OpenRegister.integrations
tasks.description: register, unregister, list, get, onChange, listByGroup; collision policy per AD-11; queue stub for late-loaded apps.

tasks.title: Create src/composables/useIntegrationRegistry.js — reactive registry consumer
tasks.description: Vue composable returning reactive list + selection helpers.

tasks.title: Add integrations export to src/index.js
tasks.description: Public barrel export.

tasks.title: Document the API in CLAUDE.md
tasks.description: Integration registry contract section in @conduction/nextcloud-vue's CLAUDE.md.

tasks.description: Maps to existing CnFilesTab + new CnFilesCard.

tasks.title: Each declares referenceType: <id> for reference-property crossover
tasks.description: All five register a referenceType matching their id.
